A Message from Shira

You took the
first step.

Hi, I'm Shira, and I want to congratulate you for taking the first step toward prioritizing your well-being.

Healing looks different for everyone and that's exactly how it should be. Whether you're seeking emotional clarity, tools to navigate life's ups and downs, or simply a safe space to breathe and reset, I'm here to walk with you. I combine evidence-based and holistic approaches to help you find balance, clarity, and empowerment on your own terms.

I believe that true growth happens when we combine knowledge with lived experience. Life has been my greatest teacher, and I'm here to listen, relate, and support you in your own journey. Together, we can turn challenges into opportunities for healing, resilience, and personal growth and create a specific path toward the wellness and fulfillment you seek and deserve.

You deserve more than survival. You deserve clarity, alignment, and the ability to thrive as the person you were created to be.

Grace & Peace, Shira SK

MALPCLPCCCMHC CPCRYT-200Licensed PA & NV

Who I Serve

Every journey
is welcome here.

Every person who walks through our door is met with warmth, curiosity, and deep respect. I specialize in supporting children, all women, and those whose faith is central to their healing, while also welcoming individuals, couples, teens, and families at every stage of their journey.

Children

Working with children is where my heart is deepest. I help young people develop emotional skills, build resilience, and feel truly seen and safe.

★ Core Focus

All Women

As a Black woman, this population is near and dear to my heart. Womanhood is a unique lived experience, and women of all ages, stages, and colors persevere through so much. This is a space where every woman is fully seen, deeply valued, and never has to shrink.

★ Core Focus

Christian Counseling

Faith isn't separate from healing, it can be the center of it. I integrate biblical principles and psychological wisdom for clients whose spirituality is central to their care.

★ Core Focus

Couples

Helping partners build stronger communication, deeper connection, and tools for navigating conflict with grace and understanding.

Teens & Individuals

Meeting teens and adults wherever they are providing tools, clarity, and a consistent, caring presence at every stage of life.

What We Offer

Science & soul,
woven together.

01

Individual Therapy

The core of Serendipity Wellness. One-on-one psychotherapy using DBT, CBT, Person-Centered Therapy, and Motivational Interviewing deeply tailored to you. For individuals, children, couples, and teens.

DBTCBTPerson-Centered
02

Yoga & Movement Integration

Yoga-informed therapy and movement meditation that brings the body fully into the healing process from the comfort of your home. Body wisdom meets psychological healing.

RYT-200SomaticMovement
03

Groups & Workshops

Empowerment-focused group experiences, retreats, and community workshops. Includes Group Yoga sessions at $30 per class. A nurturing space for shared growth, connection, and collective healing.

GroupsRetreatsWorkshops
04

Holistic Tools & Consultation

Journaling, affirmations, mindfulness practices, and treatment planning support. Professional consultation and referral letters also available. Warm, grounded guidance for every stage of your journey.

JournalingAffirmationsConsultation

Resources & Education

Tools for your healing journey.

Mental Health

You Don't Have to Hit Rock Bottom

Therapy is not only for rock bottom moments. If you are feeling overwhelmed, disconnected, stuck, or just not quite yourself, that is enough of a reason to reach out.

Getting Started

Your First Session

  • ✦A warm, judgment-free conversation
  • ✦Questions about your goals & history
  • ✦Share only what feels safe
  • ✦Together we'll build your care plan
  • ✦You'll leave feeling heard & hopeful

Treatment Method

What Is DBT?

  • ✦Dialectical Behavior Therapy
  • ✦Manages intense emotions
  • ✦Improves relationships & communication
  • ✦Teaches mindfulness & distress tolerance
  • ✦Effective for women & children

Affirmations for All Women

You Are Worthy of Rest & Healing

"I release the weight of other people's expectations. I am allowed to take up space. My healing is not selfish, it is sacred."

Affirmations for Every Woman

You Are Enough, Exactly as You Are

"I choose myself, without apology. I am growing, even when it's hard to see. I deserve love, peace, and joy in abundance."

Yoga & Healing

How Yoga Supports Mental Health

  • ✦Activates the parasympathetic nervous system
  • ✦Reduces cortisol (stress hormone)
  • ✦Builds body awareness & self-compassion
  • ✦Complements talk therapy beautifully
  • ✦Accessible to every body & level

Let's Set the Record Straight

Therapy Myths, Busted

  • ✗"Only serious problems need therapy"
  • ✗"Asking for help is weakness"
  • ✗"Therapy takes forever"
  • ✗"Faith means I shouldn't need it"
  • ✓Therapy is for anyone who wants to grow

For Parents

Signs Your Child May Need Support

  • ✦Sudden changes in behavior or mood
  • ✦Withdrawing from friends or family
  • ✦Declining grades or school refusal
  • ✦Physical complaints with no medical cause
  • ✦Expressing hopelessness or fear

Faith & Healing

Faith + Therapy Work Together

  • ✦Your beliefs are honored, not set aside
  • ✦Biblical wisdom + psychology = whole healing
  • ✦Prayer & therapy complement each other
  • ✦No need to choose between faith & mental health
  • ✦Available by request

My Approach

Where therapy
meets the whole person.

I draw from multiple evidence-based modalities to create a therapeutic experience as unique as you are practical, compassionate, and rooted in real results.

Dialectical Behavior Therapy (DBT)

Skills-based tools for managing intense emotions and building healthier relationships. My most-used modality, especially effective with women and children.

Person-Centered Therapy (PCT)

The foundation of my deep psychotherapy work a safe, non-judgmental space for self-awareness, self-trust, and growth at your own pace.

CBT & Motivational Interviewing

Practical tools for reframing thought patterns and building self-awareness helping clients see real, measurable change.

Christian Counseling (by request)

Integrating faith and psychology for clients who wish to incorporate their spiritual beliefs as a source of strength in their healing.

Yoga Integration

Where the body
becomes a
pathway to healing.

At Serendipity Wellness, yoga is not separate from therapy, it is therapy. Shira is a certified RYT-200 yoga teacher who weaves movement, breath, and somatic awareness directly into the healing process.

No experience needed. No perfect poses. Just you, exactly as you are.

RYT-200 Certified · Shira Stewart-King

What Is Yoga-Informed Therapy?

Science-backed.
Body-informed.
Soul-centered.

Yoga-informed therapy is a one-on-one therapeutic practice where movement, breath, and mindfulness are used intentionally to support mental health goals, alongside or woven into talk therapy.

Research shows yoga reduces cortisol, regulates the nervous system, and helps process trauma stored in the body, reaching places the mind alone sometimes cannot.

Yoga-Informed Therapy

Breathwork and gentle movement woven into your therapy session, helping you access feelings the mind alone can't always reach.

🧘 Movement Meditation

Flowing postures with guided meditation calming the nervous system and building present-moment awareness.

👥 Group Yoga & Retreats

Community healing through shared movement including group sessions and wellness retreats that build connection and collective restoration.

Why Yoga + Therapy Works

Calms the Mind

Reduces anxiety, quiets rumination, and creates mental space for healing.

Heals the Body

Releases trauma stored in the body that talk therapy alone can't always reach.

Regulates Emotions

Builds emotional regulation skills you need to navigate daily life.

Builds Self-Trust

Reconnects you to your body's wisdom and inner knowing.

"The body keeps the score, and the body can also lead the healing."

Serendipity Wellness

Who Is Yoga-Informed Therapy For?

Every body.
Every story.

Yoga-informed therapy at Serendipity is adapted entirely to you adapted to your body, your history, and your comfort level. You do not need to be flexible, experienced, or athletic.

You just need to show up.

Anxiety & Stress

Breath-based practices to calm the nervous system and reduce chronic stress.

Trauma & PTSD

Trauma-sensitive yoga that gently reconnects you to your body in a safe, empowering way.

Depression & Low Energy

Movement that restores vitality, lifts mood, and builds a sense of agency and hope.

Self-Discovery & Growth

For those who want to deepen their relationship with themselves, body, mind, and spirit.

Transparent Pricing

Simple, honest fees.

Serendipity Wellness is a private pay practice. We believe you deserve to know exactly what to expect before you book. All sessions are confidential, compassionate, and completely yours.

Some insurance may be accepted. Please reach out directly to discuss your coverage options. We will always work with you.

Service Rate

Psychotherapy (Individual)

One-on-one therapy. Anxiety, trauma, depression, adjustment disorder and more.

$100 virtual$120 in-person

Yoga-Informed Therapy

Somatic, yoga-informed therapy that brings the body fully into the healing process.

$140 / session

Treatment Planning

Collaborative development of your personalized wellness and treatment plan.

$60

Group Yoga

Community yoga sessions focused on wellness, movement, and collective healing.

$30 / class

10-Week Wellness Plan

4 sessions per month for 10 weeks. Includes clinical documentation and email support. Save $160 vs. individual session pricing.

$320 / monthvs. $480 at standard rate

Referrals / Letters

Professional referral letters, documentation, and clinical correspondence.

$150

Free Consultation

A 15-minute call to get to know each other and see if we are a good fit. No pressure, ever.

Complimentary

Private Pay Practice Serendipity Wellness is a private pay practice, meaning payment is made directly at time of service. Some insurance plans may provide out-of-network reimbursement. We are happy to provide superbills upon request. Please reach out to discuss your options.
